subcodes.first_line: God hath heard that which thou didst utter in remembrance of God, thy Lord and the Lord of all worlds, and We have witnessed that which hath befallen thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمع الله ما نطقت به فی ذکر الله ربک و رب العالمین و شاهدنا ما ورد علیک
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @wisdom [hikmat], @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort
